_comment: pt.21 — pre-seeded Priya<->reviewer 2-party conversation ids (RLS unblock). dispatchReviewer inserts the review message directly into these, skipping findOrCreateConversation whose participant query times out (Supabase 57014) under RLS and then falls through to CREATE -> 403. Seeded/verified via Pentagon MCP find_conversation (runs as Priya) on 2026-05-29; stable since pt.13. If a conv is ever recreated, re-run: node-less -> Pentagon MCP find_conversation([<reviewerId>]).
